name: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Fondo de Inversion Compass DVA Multiaxis
summary: Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos - Fondo de Inversion Compass DVA Multiaxis is a multi-asset investment fund. It is managed by Compass Group Chile S.A. Administradora General de Fondos and aims to generate returns by investing in a diversified portfolio across various asset classes.
